query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_scans, SUM(CASE WHEN totalAssets = 0 AND totalFindings = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as empty_scans, SUM(CASE WHEN totalAssets > 0 OR totalFindings > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as real_scans, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failed_scans, SUM(CASE WHEN primaryDomain LIKE '%test%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as test_domain_scans FROM domain_intel_scans;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2k2SuDvpDb6F44q.5f28f8362a85 --database VmWWcXQYZJYuALRdNNvsC2 --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_scans, SUM(CASE WHEN totalAssets = 0 AND totalFindings = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as empty_scans, SUM(CASE WHEN totalAssets > 0 OR totalFindings > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as real_scans, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failed_scans, SUM(CASE WHEN primaryDomain LIKE '%test%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as test_domain_scans FROM domain_intel_scans;
